channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Security forces recover 1,000 rustled livestock in Kogi
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Kogi State security forces, in collaboration with various agencies, have recovered 1,000 rustled livestock, dismantling criminal networks in the region.
Read More: https://punchng.com/security-forces-recover-1000-rustled-livestock-in-kogi/

item.title: UPDATED: Kidnapped Ekiti worshippers regain freedom, one dies in captivity
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Kidnapped Ekiti worshippers from Christ Apostolic Church have regained freedom after weeks in captivity, though one victim tragically died. Read more on th
Read More: https://punchng.com/police-rescue-abducted-ekiti-worshippers/

item.title: Morgan double helps Wales beat Fiji in Nations Championship opener
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Jac Morgan scored two tries as Wales opened their Nations Championship campaign with a 39-24 victory over Fiji in Cardiff.

item.title: Hull KR v Hull FC: Touching moment players pay tribute to Jai Arrow
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Hull FC players celebrated in tribute for Jai Arrow, who was recently diagnosed with MND

item.title: World Cup: ‘They kick the crap out of me’, Messi jokes after Cape Verde clash
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lionel Messi light-heartedly describes the physical treatment he received from Cape Verde players during Argentina’s World Cup last-16 victory.

item.title: Constitution River oozes class in Eclipse stroll
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Constitution River further enhanced his growing reputation with a dominant display in the Coral-Eclipse at Sandown.

item.title: Williams sisters out of Wimbledon doubles after 'heartbroken' Serena injury
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Serena Williams has failed to recover from a knee issue in time to play doubles at Wimbledon.

item.title: Bayelsa’s poverty: PDP slams Diri administration for shifting blame to FG
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: PDP criticises the Diri administration over rising poverty and hunger in Bayelsa, urging urgent economic recovery measures and job creation. The post Bayelsa’s poverty: PDP slams Diri administration for shifting blame to FG appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: Defending champion Swiatek knocked out of Wimbledon
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Defending women's champion Iga Swiatek has been knocked out of Wimbledon after suffering a straight-sets defeat to 29th seed Alexandra Eala.

item.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

item.title: Igboho’s security network rescues kidnapped Oyo woman, son in Kwara
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Sunday Igboho’s security network, Iru Ekun, successfully rescued a kidnapped Oyo woman and her son in Kwara State after a fierce gun battle with abductors.
Read More: https://punchng.com/igbohos-security-network-rescues-kidnapped-oyo-woman-son-in-kwara/

item.description: Nigerian gospel stars Mercy Chinwo and Nathaniel Bassey have released a new worship song and video titled Promise Keeper, a faith-filled declaration of God's steadfast love and faithfulness to every promise He has made. item.title: Rebel attacks in northern Mali: Some targets meant as 'diversions', expert says
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: The Malian army said Saturday that several northern towns, including Gao and Sévaré, were targeted by rebels. The statement came as a rebel group announced a new offensive to capture a town in the country's north. Andrew Lebovich, a research fellow at Clingendael's Conflict Research Unit, said some

item.title: World Cup 2026: New generation reshaping football beyond Ronaldo, Messi

item.title: David Rubenstein's Belief in 'Patriotic Philanthropy'
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: David Rubenstein, Carlyle Group co-founder and host of Bloomberg's The David Rubenstein Show, shares with David Gura his motivation behind, what he terms, "patriotic philanthropy," focusing on preserving key historical documents and monuments in the United States. (Source: Bloomberg)

It was the first time that French authorities had detected the deadl

item.title: Polls Say American Pride Depends on How You Ask

item.title: National security: Beyond the headlines, By Chido Onumah
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: …the quiet work of national security…rarely commands banner headlines or dominates the news cycle. Yet it is this patient, disciplined, and often unseen work that secures the nation, strengthens democratic governance, protects public confidence, and preserves hope for future generations.

item.title: Giants suffer again as Knights win Magic Weekend opener
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: York Knights heaped more misery on Huddersfield as the Giants suffered their 10th straight defeat with a 36-24 loss in the opening match of the 2026 Super League Magic Weekend.

item.dc:creator: The Sun

Marenoff-Zausner emphasized the museum's appeal, attracting over a million visitors annually, and highlighted t

item.title: New wave of coordinated rebel attacks hits Mali
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Jihadists and their separatist Tuareg allies hit Mali with fresh coordinated attacks Saturday, striking multiple towns and a prison just months after hobbling the country's military junta with a similar wave of assaults. FRANCE 24's Philip Turle explains.

item.title: Former champion Rybakina crashes out at Wimbledon
item.dc:creator: Vanguard Sports
item.description: Rybakina was hoping to follow her Australian Open triumph in January by winning Wimbledon for the second time. The post Former champion Rybakina crashes out at Wimbledon appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: A martian rock has lots of carbon on it, and it's not clear why
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://arstechnica.com/science/2026/07/a-martian-rock-has-lots-of-carbon-on-it-and-its-not-clear-why/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48785459 Points: 17 # Comments: 1

item.title: Hey number pad lovers, this is a keyboard we can finally agree on
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: I know a vocal group of people who swear by the number pad on their keyboard. And yet, for years I haven't cared about using one - until I put my hands on the Epomaker RT98. It's a mechanical keyboard with a charming retro aesthetic, a fun CRT-like screen, VIA compatibility, a nice typing feel, [&#8

item.title: Canada vs Morocco LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 last 16
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Live coverage and text updates as cohosts Canada play Morocco in the round of 16 knockout stage.
